raw_consumer_statement:
Between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, there were charges in excess of {$2000.00} charged to my home depot card that were not authorized. I have written multiple requests to Home Depot to remove the charges. I explicitly explained in detail the reason I was disputing the charges. 

I authorize a contractor to use my card for a specific job I was doing. His wife took the card stating she would pick up supplies the contractor needed and the contractor agreed. She went on a shopping spree for XXXX items, etc. The contractor was licensed and bonded and fully recommended. By allowing him to use my card, I was not negligent in my allocation or use of my card. I immeditely called the contractor and Home Depot. I made a fruad claim with Home Depot even prior to the statement coming out as I monitor my account online. 

I do not believe I was negligent, or not responsible for my card. I requested from Home Depot proof that as the only allowed signer, that the charges were made and signed by myself. They refused to supply. I also filed immediately a police report with the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ]
